tokenarthelper.requires-upload-permission: Token Art Helper requires file upload permission.

image-upload-directory.name: Image Upload Directory
image-upload-directory.hint: The directory where token and portrait images will be saved. Supports [data], [s3:bucket], and ForgeVTT paths.

token-size.name: Token Image Size
token-size.hint: The size (width and height in pixels) of the generated token image.

portrait-size.name: Portrait Image Size
portrait-size.hint: The size (width and height in pixels) of the generated portrait image.

image-save-type.name: Image Save Type
image-save-type.hint: The file format used when saving images.

default-color.name: Default Color Layer Color
default-color.hint: The default color used when adding a color layer.

default-crop-image.name: Crop Image by Default
default-crop-image.hint: If enabled, images will be cropped to fit the canvas rather than letterboxed.

default-algorithm.name: Use Ray Mask Algorithm
default-algorithm.hint: If enabled, uses the Ray Mask algorithm for mask generation. If disabled, uses Marching Squares.

log-level.name: Log Level
log-level.hint: Controls the verbosity of console logging.

notification.failedLoad: Failed to load image from {imgSrc}. Falling back to {default}.

download.url: Enter the URL of the image you wish to load

CustomMaskEditor.title: Custom Mask Editor
CustomMaskEditor.add: Left-click and drag to paint the mask (reveal area).
CustomMaskEditor.remove: Shift+click or right-click to erase the mask (hide area).
CustomMaskEditor.brush: Use the scroll wheel to change the brush size.

quicksetart.title: Quick Set Art
quicksetart.dropToReplace: Drag a different actor to replace
quicksetart.noImages: No images found in the upload folder.
quicksetart.noActor: Please drag an actor into the drop zone before applying.
quicksetart.noImagesSelected: Please select at least one image before applying.
quicksetart.linkActor: Link Actor (token represents the actor document)
quicksetart.setTokenName: Set token name to actor name

MagicLasso.title: Magic Lasso
MagicLasso.description: Click on the image to select a region by color. Ctrl+click to add to the selection. Drag to adjust threshold.
MagicLasso.fill: Fill the selected area with the chosen color.
